upgrade.title: Pro plan required
upgrade.aiInsightsDesc: AI Insights — including demand forecasts, reorder suggestions, revenue analysis, and the lead funnel — are available on the Pro plan.
upgrade.leadsDesc: Leads & contacts — the pipeline board, contact profiles, and WhatsApp conversation history — are available on the Pro plan.

login.title: Sign in
login.tagline: AI-powered business insights for your business

signup.title: Create your account
signup.tagline: Start managing your business with AI insights
signup.whatsappHint: From your Meta Developer Console → WhatsApp → Phone numbers
signup.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
signup.passwordNeedsUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
signup.passwordNeedsLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
signup.passwordNeedsNumber: Password must contain at least one number
signup.passwordHint: Min. 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.tagline: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code
forgotPassword.checkEmail: We sent a reset code to {{email}}. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
forgotPassword.enterCode: I have a code — reset my password

googleOnboarding.title: Almost there!
googleOnboarding.tagline: Tell us about your business to finish setting up your account ({{email}})

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.tagline: Enter the code from your email and choose a new password

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noInsightsYet: No AI insights generated yet. Visit the

insights.title: AI Insights
insights.subtitle: AI-powered analysis of your business data
insights.clickGenerate: Click "Generate insights" to analyze your business data with AI
insights.funnelDisclaimer: Shows how many contacts are in each stage today. Ratios compare current stage sizes, not conversion of a single cohort over time.
insights.funnelNoPipeline: No contacts in prospect, interested, or closed won yet.

hero.title: Your store, your catalog, your payments — all on WhatsApp
hero.subtitle: Clienta AI is your ecommerce engine on WhatsApp. Manage your inventory, share your catalog, and collect payments — without ever leaving the chat. Every plan starts with a 14-day free trial.

realEstate.title: Clienta Inmobiliaria
realEstate.subtitle: Specialized real estate solution. Powerful property, lead and visit management tools powered by Clienta AI.

trust.title: Your data is secured
trust.subtitle: We run on Amazon Web Services. Your business data is encrypted and stored securely in the cloud.

phoneMock.msgIn: I want the blue shirt (size M). How do I pay?
phoneMock.msgOut: Here's your order summary and payment link. Done in seconds!

offers.title: Everything you need in one place
offers.subtitle: Your full ecommerce operation in one place — inventory, customers, and payments synced automatically.
offers.feature0Desc: One catalog for all your stock. Set reorder points, import via CSV, and get low-stock alerts so you never run out.
offers.feature1Desc: Sell directly in chat. Share your catalog, take orders, and collect payments — all inside WhatsApp. Full conversation history linked to every contact.
offers.feature2Desc: Daily summaries you’ll actually use: demand forecasts, reorder suggestions, revenue trends, and spending insights.
offers.feature3Desc: One place for every customer. Lead status, tier, and spend history so you know who matters most.
offers.feature4Desc: From WhatsApp chat to paid order in one flow. Every sale recorded automatically — no re-typing, no spreadsheets.

collaborate.title: Collaborate with us
collaborate.subtitle: Interested in partnering, reselling, or custom solutions? Get in touch.
collaborate.formSuccess: Thanks! We'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.
collaborate.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

campaigns.title: WhatsApp Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Broadcast to your entire contact list or targeted segments directly via WhatsApp. Write once, personalize for each customer.
campaigns.tab1Desc: Send personalized WhatsApp messages to your full contact list or a selected segment. Write your template once and reach hundreds of customers with their name automatically filled in.
campaigns.tab2Desc: Filter leads by status or loyalty tier — bronze, silver, or gold — and send targeted follow-ups to win back customers who have gone quiet.
campaigns.tab3Desc: Share news, new arrivals, and service updates directly on WhatsApp — the channel your customers already use every day.
campaigns.previewMessage: Hi [Name], we have a special offer just for you — {{tab}}. Tap to see details. 🎉

services.title: Custom websites & applications
services.subtitle: We design and build polished, scalable digital products — not only Clienta AI. From marketing sites to full-stack apps, we partner with businesses that want clarity, performance, and solutions that grow with them.
services.webDesc: Brand-forward sites, conversion-focused landing pages, and fast, accessible front ends that look sharp on every device.
services.webPoint1: Responsive UI, design systems, and content structure
services.appDesc: Custom web apps, internal tools, and integrations that connect your stack — CRM, payments, messaging, and operations — with maintainable, production-grade code.
services.appPoint3: Iterative delivery and long-term support options
services.ctaHint: Share your goals — we’ll follow up with next steps and a tailored scope.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: No forever-free tier — every plan includes a 14-day free trial. Basic gives you the full ecommerce stack on WhatsApp; Pro adds the AI chatbot, leads pipeline, and AI reports. Contact us for a quote.
pricing.starterDesc: Your shop fully live on WhatsApp — shareable link, inventory management, and all transactions handled.
pricing.growthDesc: Monthly or annual billing — choose annual for the best savings.
pricing.featureChatbot: AI chatbot on your WhatsApp number
pricing.featureMonthlyOrAnnual: Monthly or annual billing (save with annual)

footer.address: Avenida Atahualpa y Victor Hugo, Ambato, Ecuador (Zip: 180204)
footer.unsubscribe: To unsubscribe from marketing communications, please contact us at info@clientaai.com or click 'Unsubscribe' in any of our emails.

inventoryForm.imageStoredHint: Image will be stored in S3 and used in WhatsApp.
inventoryForm.tagsHint: Comma-separated keywords. The bot uses these to find the right product when customers describe what they want.

whatsapp.title: Connect WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Link your Meta WhatsApp number to this business so our platform can route messages here.
whatsapp.getPhoneIdHint: Get your Phone number ID from
whatsapp.phoneIdCopyHint: → your App → WhatsApp → API Setup → Phone numbers. Copy the numeric ID (e.g. 106540352242922).
whatsapp.phoneIdRequired: Meta Phone number ID is required.
whatsapp.tokenHint: From Meta App → WhatsApp → API → Temporary or System User token. Leave blank to keep existing.
whatsapp.businessAccountHint: From Meta Business Suite → WhatsApp Manager → Phone numbers (Account ID).
whatsapp.placeholderAiPrompt: You are a helpful store assistant for...
whatsapp.successLinked: WhatsApp is linked. Our virtual assistant can now resolve your business when messages arrive.
whatsapp.supportPhoneHint: Digits only (country code + number). Shown to customers when they choose “Human agent” in chat.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Sales history (orders come from WhatsApp)
transactions.noTransactionsHint: Transactions are created when orders are completed via WhatsApp
transactions.cancelConfirm: Cancel this transaction? This will remove it from history and restore inventory quantities.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: WhatsApp conversations — click to open and reply
messages.noConversationsHint: WhatsApp chats will appear here (one per number)
messages.conversationClosed: This conversation is closed. Sending is disabled to comply with WhatsApp policies. If the customer messages again, it will reopen as Active.
messages.sentViaHint: Sent via WhatsApp using your Connect WhatsApp token.
messages.selectConversation: Select a conversation to view thread and reply
messages.noMessagesInThread: No messages in this thread yet

shop.orderSentToWhatsapp: We sent your order summary to WhatsApp. Reply there with your payment screenshot to complete the order.
shop.orderNotesPlaceholder: Add order notes (optional): allergies, no onions, extra spicy, etc.
